title: Rogue CorSec

{{Quote|My former partner, and best friend at that, apparently has gone "rogue". He joined up with a group of former agents that have decided to go into business for themselves.|A CorSec agent, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:CA">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|CorSec Agent|Corellia}}</ref>}}
The '''Rogue CorSecs''', also known as '''RogueSecs''', were a criminal splinter group of the [[Corellian Security Force]]s on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

During this time, the Rogue CorSecs were considered an ally of the [[Hidden Daggers]], a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] organization active in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].<ref name="AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|Well, I must say that I am very impressed. You not only foiled the plot to discredit the Diktat, but defeated the Rogue CorSec commanders who were apparently behind the whole thing!|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mack Jasper|Jasper]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" />}}
Sometime prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], these disgraced ex-CorSec [[Officer/Legends|officers]] claimed the deserted island with the [[Rogue CorSec Base|old CorSec base]] as their headquarters for thuggery, extortion and wanton violence. The Rogues also used the base's defense capacities to fight their former associates at CorSec, who were constantly hunting them.

Sometime following 0 BBY, [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Politics/Legends|politician]] [[Karin Featherlight]] uploaded the coordinates of the Rogue CorSec base to a [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="SWG:KF">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|Karin Featherlight|Corellia}}</ref> A loyal CorSec [[Agent/Legends|agent]], angered by their betrayal, also tasked a spacer with locating the base and enacting vengeance against the traitors.<ref name="SWG:CA" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the Rogue CorSec commanders [[Hiram Bish]] and [[Mtara Vinram]] elaborated a plot to discredit the Diktat, [[Daclif Gallamby]], and his [[Corellian republic|government]].<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" /> As part of the plot, they created evidences that the Diktat himself was [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]].<ref name="SWG:SOtGS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Seek Out the Gadget Specialist|Corellia}}</ref> To do so, the Rogue CorSec first recruited a gang of thugs known as the [[Ragtags]] to smuggle illegal spice in the [[Coronet Capitol]] building.<ref name="SWG:RtMSC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Reacquire the Missing Starship Component Shipment|Corellia}}</ref> Then, the Rogue CorSec managed to plant a remote relay device directly on the Diktat's personal data terminal. With this device, they were able to send files from a remote location and make them appear as originating from the terminal to which the device was attached. The Rogue CorSec thus planted orders, apparently from the Diktat himself, instructing the Ragtags to smuggle spice into the Capitol.<ref name="SWG:SOtGS" />
[[File:Corellia_corsecbase.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Rogue CorSec base.]]
The plan was foiled because the Ragtags made a mistake and also smuggled in the Capitol a shipment of starship components stolen from the businessman [[Ral Mundi]].<ref name="SWG:RtMSC" /> A spacer was recruited by CorSec [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mack Jasper]] to investigate the missing shipment.<ref name="SWG:FtMSOSC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Find the Missing Shipment of Starship Components|Corellia}}</ref> The spacer discovered that the shipment was stolen by the Ragtags and transported into the Capitol, along with the smuggled spice.<ref name="SWG:RtMSC" /> Further evidence were found when an [[Information broker/Legends|informant]] contacted [[Brantlee Spondoon]], the aide to the Diktat, to discuss a plot targeting the Diktat. Even if the Rogue CorSec managed to assassinate the informant in a Coronet [[Warehouse (Coronet City)|warehouse]], the spacer discovered the Rogue CorSec implication.<ref name="SWG:HGtII">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Help Get the Informant's Information|Corellia}}</ref> The spacer also learned from another informant named [[Jonset]] that the Rogues were working with the [[Ragtags]].<ref name="SWG:FowtRCAD">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Find out what the Rogue CorSec Are Doing|Corellia}}</ref> Lieutenant Jasper then ordered to search the Diktat's office and the spacer found the remote relay device.<ref name="SWG:StDO">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Search the Diktat's Office|Corellia}}</ref> A gadget specialist easily identified the device and helped Lieutenant Jasper to find the origin of the transmission.<ref name="SWG:SOtGS" /> The spacer tracked the signal to the Rogue CorSec Base and infiltrated the base. The spacer downloaded proof of the Diktat's innocence and finally killed the Rogue CorSec commanders responsible for the plot.<ref name="SWG:GttSotRS" />

The same year, a group of Rogue CorSec miscreants led by [[Xyrias Undea]] was present in [[Doaba Guerfel/Legends|Doaba Guerfel]]. They harassed [[Gwhirrye Baric]], a small-time thug, until they were stopped by a CorSec agent working for [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vitala Baize]].<ref name="SWG:TCCSC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|The Chirq Council: Seek Council|Corellia}}</ref>

Later, two Rogue CorSec officers, [[Erinn Bonette]] and [[Echdo Bervekk]], worked with another criminal, the [[Meatlumps|Meatlump]] lieutenant [[Kaiya Merel]]. Merel dispatched a new Meatlump recruit to help them hijack a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]. However, the Meatlump recruit was in fact a spacer working for the ''[[Corellia Times]]'' [[Journalist/Legends|reporter]] [[Vani Korr]] who was investigating the Meatlumps. The spacer met the two Rogue CorSec officers and killed them.<ref name="SWG:TMHP6">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|The Meatlumps Hideout, Part 6|Corellia}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The [[W:c:swg:Rogue CorSec|Rogue CorSecs]] were a [[W:c:swg:Faction|faction]] in the [[2003]] [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']],<ref name="AED" /> prior to the [[Star Wars video games|game's]] closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
